---
title: "Harnessing open street map data with R and QGIS"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). Harnessing open street map data with R and QGIS."
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_harnessing_2014"
citation-type: "report"
citation-type-label: "Report"
venue: ""
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/77643/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This practical guide explains how to extract, process, and analyze OpenStreetMap (OSM) data using R and QGIS. It highlights the benefits of using open-source tools and data for urban and transport research."
---

**Type:** Report
**Year:** 2014

[URL](http://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/77643/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This practical guide explains how to extract, process, and analyze OpenStreetMap (OSM) data using R and QGIS. It highlights the benefits of using open-source tools and data for urban and transport research.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). Harnessing open street map data with R and QGIS.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@techreport{lovelace_harnessing_2014,
	title = {Harnessing open street map data with {R} and {QGIS}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/77643/},
	abstract = {This practical guide explains how to extract, process, and analyze OpenStreetMap (OSM) data using R and QGIS. It highlights the benefits of using open-source tools and data for urban and transport research.},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2014},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
